scripts.dev: wrangler pages dev -- npm run dev --workspace=frontend
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "frontend,backend,api" -c "blue,green,purple" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=api"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n "frontend,backend,api" -c "blue,green,purple" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=api"
